title: Keystroke GUI Exit
description: Pressing WASD will exit the GUI you are currently in. For example, pressing W while being in the inventory will close it.
body: When pressing WASD, it exits any current gui you are in. For example, being in a chest gui, would allow you to exit it just with the press of WASD. This can also be done legit, so it isn't bannable. However, some servers may have restrictions on this mod. Since this is a new idea, most servers will not have restrictions on this.
